verb_to_be_negative.name: Verb to be: negative forms (am not / is not / are not)

am_not.name: am not — first person singular negative (I + to be negative)

is_not.name: is not / isn't — third person singular negative (he/she/it + to be negative)

are_not.name: are not / aren't — plural and second person negative (you/we/they + to be negative)

be_negative_contraction.name: Contractions with to be negative (isn't, aren't)

be_negative_subject_agreement.name: Subject-verb agreement in to be negatives

questions.question: I {a1} happy today.

a1.is not: «is not» — хибна форма: is not вживається з he / she / it, а не з I.
a1.are not: «are not» — хибна форма: are not вживається з you / we / they, але не з I.
